lastReleaseMessage: security hardening - atomic kitten reservation, claim-based release/refund (no double payout), webhook dedup, API rate limiting, storage upload policy, admin flags no longer world-readable

milestone.label: Phase 2 built (escrow payments, reviews, waitlists, admin tiers); launch-readiness next

items: Set RESEND_API_KEY on the Worker to activate notification emails (code shipped, no-ops until set)
Verify breeder release-to-payout end-to-end after a breeder completes Stripe onboarding (Connect enabled in test; onboarding verified)
Turnstile on signup/apply (rate limiting shipped; CAPTCHA still open - see docs/SECURITY-ASSESSMENT-2026-07-01.md)
Register apex yesandcattery.com + route; remove demo data at launch
Legal review of Terms + Privacy + escrow custody model; onboard founding breeders with real data
Go-live ops (monitoring, backups/export, Stripe live-key rotation)
Phase 3: dispute handling on held deposits
